chunks.text: # Subroutine for "obscuring" a set of (numeric) SIDs. # See the file COPYING in the main distribution directory for copyright notice. sub obfuscate { my @keys = @_; my (%map, %counts, %present, %OK, $i); for $key (@keys) { if ($present

for ($i = 0; $i < 8; $i += 1) { $count{$i . substr ($key, $i, 1)} += 1; } } $present{$key} = 1; } @keys = keys %OK; # Now all @keys are unique, and 8 digits long. $count{xy} is # (approx.) the number of keys having digit

s # (approx.) the number of keys having digit y at position x. my ($key1, $k, $n, $c); foreach $key0 (@keys) { $key1 = "." x 8; FIND: while (1) { $c = ""; for ($j = 0; $j < 8; $j += 1) { next if (substr ($key1, $
1) = substr ($key0, $k, 1); foreach $key (@keys) { if ($key ne $key0 && $key =~ /$key1/) { next FIND; } } last FIND; } $map{$key0} = $key1; } return %map; } 1;
